creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
I tried to build the updated port and it failed to link
grub-mount because -lgeom was missing for that target.  (And configure
had picked up fuse being present so there also was a FUSE knob
missing.)  Fixing grub-mount linking was easier in Makefile.util.am
so I had to add USE_AUTOTOOLS which invalidated the
TARGET_CPPFLAGS_MINILZO patches so then I also had to fix the missing
includes again:  I just symlinked /usr/include/{sys,machine} into
the source dir in a post-configure target because the failing sources
are built with -I. .

And I also added the bugfix patch for loading 9.1 or head amd64
kernels directly via "kfreebsd /boot/kernel/kernel" etc, see this
thread:

	http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2012-July/068924.html

(the pastebin link for the grub maintainer's patch in that post
expired so I meanwhile also mirrored it here:

	http://people.freebsd.org/~nox/tmp/grub2-paste_180121.patch

)

And I fixed the plist, added a missing help2man and dejavu
dependendy, and updated the maintainer's email.  So here is the
updated (tho only build-tested) patch, also at:

	http://people.freebsd.org/~nox/tmp/grub-2.00-001.patch

--- Makefile	12 Dec 2010 01:11:24 -0000	1.5

@@ -6,41 +6,81 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	grub2
-PORTVERSION=	1.98
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.00
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://alpha.gnu.org/gnu/grub/
+MASTER_SITES=	GNU/grub
 DISTNAME=	grub-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	rick@lgarchitecture.com
+MAINTAINER=	rick@sloservers.com
 COMMENT=	Multiboot boot loader
 
-CONFLICTS=	grub-0*
-
-GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
-USE_GMAKE=		yes
-USE_BISON=		build
-USE_GETTEXT=		yes
-ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=		i386 amd64
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
-INFO=		grub
+CONFLICTS=	grub-0*
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/flex:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/flex \
+		help2man:${PORTSDIR}/misc/help2man
 
-OPTIONS=	MKFONT "Build grub-mkfont (require freetype2)" off
+USE_XZ=		yes
+USE_GCC=	4.6+
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USE_BISON=	build
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386 amd64
+INFO=		grub grub-dev
+
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--disable-werror
+CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPP="${CC} -E"  \
+		LEX=${LOCALBASE}/bin/flex
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	MKFONT FUSE
+MKFONT_DESC=	Build grub-mkfont (require freetype2)
+FUSE_DESC=	Build grub-mount (require FUSE)
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=
+
+MAN1=		grub-editenv.1 grub-mklayout.1 grub-mkpasswd-pbkdf2.1 \
+		grub-fstest.1 grub-script-check.1 grub-kbdcomp.1 \
+		grub-mkstandalone.1 grub-mkrelpath.1 grub-mkrescue.1 \
+		grub-menulst2cfg.1 grub-mkimage.1
+MAN8=		grub-reboot.8 grub-set-default.8 grub-probe.8 \
+		grub-mkconfig.8 grub-bios-setup.8 grub-mknetdir.8 \
+		grub-install.8 grub-sparc64-setup.8 grub-ofpathname.8
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-.if defined(WITH_MKFONT)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMKFONT}
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	freetype.9:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/lib/X11/fonts/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/dejavu
+MAN1+=		grub-mkfont.1
 .else
 MKFONT=		"@comment "
 .endif
 
 PLIST_SUB+=	MKFONT=${MKFONT}
 
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MFUSE}
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	fuse:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-libs
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	automake aclocal autoconf
+ACLOCAL_ARGS=	-Im4
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-grub-mount
+MAN1+=		grub-mount.1
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-grub-mount
+FUSE=		"@comment "
+.endif
+
+PLIST_SUB+=	FUSE=${FUSE}
+
 .if ${OSVERSION} < 700000
 BROKEN=		does not compile on 6.X
 .endif
 
+post-patch:
+	@${LN} -s ${LOCALBASE}/lib/X11/fonts/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf ${WRKSRC}
+
+post-configure:
+	@${LN} -s /usr/include/machine /usr/include/sys ${WRKSRC}/grub-core
+
 post-install:
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
